generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DC motor current sensor (I_M) measuring the motor current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IMqttTopic
]

instance MotorAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder on the motor shaft providing motor angle (r_M)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RMMqttTopic
]

instance GearwheelAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder on the gearwheel shaft providing gearwheel angle (r_G)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RGmqttTopic
]

instance DownstreamAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Downstream angle sensor providing output shaft angle (r_out)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RoutMqttTopic
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance IMqttTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance RMMqttTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorAngleEncoder
]

instance RGmqttTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearwheelAngleEncoder
]

instance RoutMqttTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DownstreamAngleSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueMqttTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, GearwheelAngleEncoder
]

instance DerivedVelocityMqttTopic : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearwheelAngleEncoder, DownstreamAngleSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance I_M_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DC motor current time‑series data collected from the motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IMqttTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution, AssetAdministrationShell, ProcessingComponent
]

instance R_M_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor angle time‑series data (r_M) obtained from the motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RMMqttTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution, AssetAdministrationShell, ProcessingComponent
]

instance R_G_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearwheel angle time‑series data (r_G) obtained from the gearwheel encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RGmqttTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution, AssetAdministrationShell, ProcessingComponent
]

instance R_out_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output shaft angle time‑series data (r_out) obtained from the downstream angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RoutMqttTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution, AssetAdministrationShell, ProcessingComponent
]

instance DerivedTorque_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque time‑series data computed from I_M and r_G signals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueMqttTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution, AssetAdministrationShell, ProcessingComponent
]

instance DerivedVelocity_Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity time‑series data computed from r_G and r_out signals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityMqttTopic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution, AssetAdministrationShell, ProcessingComponent
]

instance MotorSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor with friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
]

instance GearwheelSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable model of the gearwheel dynamics in the two‑stage gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
]

instance GearboxSimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable model of the cycloidal gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecution
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLStructuralTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for structural modeling of the first axis (motor + gearboxes)"
]

instance SimulinkExecution : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes MathWorks Simulink models for motor, gearwheel, and gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real‑time data streaming from the robot to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Semantic binding of physical assets using the Asset Administration Shell (AAS)"
]

instance DashboardUi : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard UI for visualizing measured versus simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance ProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component that processes and analyzes incoming data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService, FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionModelExchangeService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard‑based visualization of measured versus simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisInsight, MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of friction using white‑box and black‑box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisInsight, UpdateFrictionModelAction
]

instance FrictionModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous exchange of updated friction models with the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelUpdateInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facilitates motion‑accuracy improvement by applying updated friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Mechanical insight into static, kinetic, and viscous friction within the first axis"
]

instance FrictionModelUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameter updates for friction models applied to the robot controller"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improved motion accuracy as a result of the Digital Twin's real‑time analysis"
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to update friction model parameters in the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Data is collected and processed synchronously with the robot operation (real‑time), with continuous model updates during the running cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT orchestrates data ingestion (MQTT), processing (Processing component executing Simulink models), semantic integration via AAS, and presentation through a unified dashboard, forming a passive digital shadow linked to the physical robot."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated phase – the DT is instantiated during robot operation, continuously identifying friction and updating models across the operational lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data trace back to its originating sensor and model, use of white‑box analytical friction models complemented by black‑box data‑driven models, continuous comparison of simulated versus measured data, and dynamic model refinement to maintain fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "One‑way communication via MQTT, encapsulating sensor streams into data traces, linked to Asset Administration Shells, following the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Conforms to Industrie 4.0 Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard, SysML MBSE practices, and MQTT communication standards."
]
